evaluators.name: Watchlist 3 Paying Bitcoin Programs ≥3% ROI ≤$20 Min Deposit
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added at least 3 qualifying paying Bitcoin programs (≥3% daily ROI, ≤$20 min deposit) to their watchlist.

evaluators.name: Bookmark Higher-Return Program Among Compared 10–60 Day Paying HYIPs
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user filtered correctly (optionally), compared at least two qualifying programs (paying, 10–60 running days), and bookmarked the one with the highest 30-day total return among those compared.

evaluators.name: 4-Star Review on 300%/30d Paying Program with Positive & Risk Points
evaluators.description: Checks if the user posted a 4-star review on a paying program advertising ≥300% total return over 30 days, with a 2+ sentence comment that mentions at least one positive aspect and one risk concern.

evaluators.name: New HYIPs Thread for Hypothetical 5%-Daily Program with Plan Details
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a new thread in the 'New HYIPs' category as local_user announcing a 5%-daily program and included start date, minimum deposit, payment methods, and plan details in the first post.

evaluators.name: Blacklist 2 Short-Lived High-Minimum Scam/Not-Paying Programs & Subscribe to Scam Alerts
evaluators.description: Checks if the user blacklisted at least two programs that are Scam/Not Paying, have min deposit ≥$100 and running days <15, and also enabled site-wide scam alert notifications.

evaluators.name: Cautious Non-Investing Vote on Newly Launched 5-Star Paying Program
evaluators.description: Checks if the user cast a cautious poll vote ('No, I will stay away') on a currently paying program launched within the last 7 days with payout rating 5.0 and an active poll.

evaluators.name: Dashboard Settings: Active ≥1.5% ROI in USD with Watchlist Risk Alerts
evaluators.description: Checks if account settings are configured to use USD, show only paying (active) programs with at least 1.5% daily ROI, hide closed programs, and enable in-site notifications for watchlist risk/status changes.

evaluators.name: Private Message to Latest Commenter Asking About Payout Speed and Deposit Size
evaluators.description: Checks if the user sent a private message with a clear subject to the most recent program commenter, asking at least two specific questions about payout speed and total deposit size.
